mlb.headline: Make it a dozen: Red Sox rally for 7-6 victory over Rays for 12th straight win
mlb.summary: — Wilyer Abreu hit two home runs – the second a go-ahead, two-run shot in the seventh inning that gave him four homers in two games — and the Boston Red Sox rallied for a 7-6 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays on Saturday to extend their winning streak.

mlb.headline: Skenes strikes out 8 in 7 innings as Pirates roll to 7-1 win over Guardians
mlb.summary: — Paul Skenes allowed one run and struck out eight in seven innings and the Pittsburgh Pirates defeated the Cleveland Guardians 7-1 on Sunday.

mlb.headline: 2026 MLB ABS challenge system tracker: Team, player rankings

mlb.headline: Kepler hits walk-off double in 10th, Diamondbacks rally from 7-run deficit, beat Cardinals 8-7
mlb.summary: — Max Kepler hit a walk-off RBI double in the 10th inning and the Arizona Diamondbacks rallied from a seven-run deficit to beat the St. Louis Cardinals 8-7 on Sunday.

mlb.headline: St. Louis Cardinals vs. Arizona Diamondbacks: Game Highlights

nhl.headline: Blackhawks star Connor Bedard agrees to 5-year, $75M deal
nhl.summary: Chicago Blackhawks star Connor Bedard has agreed to a $75 million, five-year contract, completing a major offseason goal for the team.

nhl.headline: Flyers, Jamie Drysdale agree to 4-year, $26 million deal
nhl.summary: The Flyers have agreed to terms with defenseman Jamie Drysdale on a four-year contract worth $26 million.

nhl.headline: Fantasy hockey rankings: Nathan MacKinnon, Connor McDavid lead 2026 rankings
nhl.summary: After a busy NHL offseason, get ready for the 2026-27 fantasy hockey season with the top 250 rankings.

nhl.headline: Blues sign recently acquired McMichael to 6-year, $40.5M deal
nhl.summary: The St. Louis Blues have signed recently acquired forward Connor McMichael to a six-year, $40.5 million contract.

nhl.headline: Wetzel: Inclusion of owner's family devalues Stanley Cup
nhl.summary: Someone should have saved Tom Dundon from his decision to put his whole family on the Stanley Cup.

nba.headline: Lendeborg outduels Boozer as Dubs claim summer league title
nba.summary: Yaxel Lendeborg helped the Warriors to their second summer league championship, becoming just the second player to win a D-I NCAA championship and a summer league title in the same year.

nba.headline: Who has won NBA summer league? List of champions
nba.summary: The NBA crowns a summer league champion each year. See which teams have won throughout history.

wnba.headline: DeWanna Bonner scores season-high 21, Mercury beat Sun 72-63 to snap 5-game skid
wnba.summary: — DeWanna Bonner scored a season-high 21 points, Kahleah Copper added 12 of her 18 points in the second half, and the Phoenix Mercury beat the Connecticut Sun 72-63 on Sunday to snap a five-game losing streak.

wnba.headline: Phoenix Mercury vs. Connecticut Sun - Game Highlights
wnba.summary: Watch the Game Highlights from Phoenix Mercury vs. Connecticut Sun, 07/19/2026

wnba.headline: Dream beat Sky 93-91 on Canada's layup at buzzer after losing star Angel Reese to knee injury
wnba.summary: — Jordin Canada made a layup at the buzzer and the Atlanta Dream bounced back after squandering a 22-point lead and losing star Angel Reese due to a knee injury, beating the Chicago Sky...

wnba.headline: Dream's Angel Reese exits win vs. Sky with left leg injury
wnba.summary: Atlanta Dream forward Angel Reese left Sunday's victory over Chicago with a left leg injury.

wnba.headline: Angel Reese 'grateful' to WNBA for Sandy Brondello suspension
wnba.summary: Angel Reese 'grateful' to WNBA for Sandy Brondello suspension

wnba.headline: Reese appreciates Brondello's apology; 'grateful' for WNBA's ban
wnba.summary: Angel Reese said she appreciated Sandy Brondello's apology for referring to her as a "protected species" but also was grateful to the WNBA for suspending Brondello for one game.

wnba.headline: Bueckers nets 25 before exiting Wings' win after collision
wnba.summary: Paige Bueckers had 25 points before leaving following a scary collision, Arike Ogunbowale scored six of her 20 down the stretch, and the Wings defeated the Sparks 90-82 on Sunday to extend their winning streak to a franchise-record six games.

wnba.headline: Bueckers scores 25, leaves late in 4th quarter, as Wings beat Sparks 90-82
wnba.summary: — Paige Bueckers had 25 points before exiting following a scary collision, Arike Ogunbowale scored six of her 20 down the stretch and the Dallas Wings beat the Los Angeles Sparks 90-82 on Sunday to extend their winning streak to a franchise...
